hooks.prompt: A file was just written or edited. First check if the path contains a plugin source folder: 'Plugins/gaudi/src-gaudi', 'Plugins/the-one-ring/src-one-ring', 'Plugins/magneto/src-magneto', 'Plugins/aule/src-aule', etc. If YES — a plugin source changed. Automatically invoke the aule-plugin-repackager skill with: 'A plugin source file was just modified at [file path]. Repackage the affected plugin and verify the .zip is in sync.' If NO, then check if the file path contains any of these Aule core files: 'skills/plugin-generation', 'skills/plugin-discovery', 'skills/marketplace-management', 'agents/plugin-builder', 'commands/', 'references/olytic-patterns', 'references/component-templates', 'references/agentic-best-practices', 'references/telemetry-template'. If YES — an Aule standard has changed. Automatically invoke the trashbot agent with this message: 'Aule was just updated ([file path that changed]). Run trashbot to sweep all other plugins and bring them up to the new standards.' If NO — the file is not an Aule standard, no action needed.

The user is asking to run trashbot or sweep all plugins. Invoke the trashbot agent immediately. Do not ask clarifying questions — trashbot is designed to run autonomously. Say: 'Running trashbot — auditing all plugins in the workspace against current Aule standards.'
